allow: Bash(powershell -Command "Test-NetConnection -ComputerName s16.wpxhosting.com -Port 465 -InformationLevel Quiet; Test-NetConnection -ComputerName s16.wpxhosting.com -Port 587 -InformationLevel Quiet; Test-NetConnection -ComputerName s16.wpxhosting.com -Port 25 -InformationLevel Quiet")
Bash(powershell -Command "Test-NetConnection -ComputerName smtp.gmail.com -Port 465 -InformationLevel Quiet; Test-NetConnection -ComputerName smtp.gmail.com -Port 587 -InformationLevel Quiet")
Bash("/c/xampp/mysql/bin/mysql.exe" -u root tutoring_platform -e "SELECT id, order_type_id, course_name, num_pages, class_type, partial_weeks, quiz_mode, work_type FROM orders WHERE id = 61")
Bash("/c/xampp/mysql/bin/mysql.exe" -u root tutoring_platform -e "UPDATE orders SET class_type='partial', partial_weeks=1 WHERE id=61; SELECT id, class_type, partial_weeks FROM orders WHERE id=61")

Bash("/c/xampp/mysql/bin/mysql.exe" -u root tutoring_platform -e "SELECT o.id, o.plan_id, p.name as plan_name, o.pricing_rule_id, pr.plan_tier FROM orders o LEFT JOIN plans p ON o.plan_id=p.id LEFT JOIN pricing_rules pr ON o.pricing_rule_id=pr.id WHERE o.id IN \(60,61,62,63,64,65,66\) ORDER BY o.id")
